stem:
The Inca of South America used intricately knotted string devices called quipus to record countable information, like population data and payments. _______ they may have used quipus to record more complex information, like stories and myths, according to researchers.

Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
explanation: The possibility that quipus also recorded stories and myths is an added use beyond recording countable data, so “In addition” fits. “As a result,” “In other words,” and “For example” would wrongly signal a consequence, a restatement, or an illustration of the first point.
